---
title: "Events"
format: html
---

## 📅 Upcoming Events

::: {.events-list}

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
08 May 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program- Workshop Day
### Ankara Development Agency 2026 Social Innovation and Social Development Technical Support Programme – Project Application Workshop

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
[🔗 Etkinlik Detayı](https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
29 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-2: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Yayla Mesleki ve Teknik Anadolu Lisesi, Zonguldak
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
30 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-3: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Gerede Hacı Sadık Öztosun Anadolu Lisesi, Bolu
:::

:::

## 📂 Past Events

::: {.events-list}

::: {.event-card .past-event}
::: {.event-date}
03 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 1/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
[🔗 Etkinlik Detayı](https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.event-card .past-event}
::: {.event-date}
10 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 2/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
[🔗 Etkinlik Detayı](https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.event-card .past-event}
::: {.event-date}
16 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-1: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Ankara Lisesi, Ankara
:::

::: {.event-card .past-event}
::: {.event-date}
17 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 3/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
[🔗 Etkinlik Detayı](https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.event-card .past-event}
::: {.event-date}
24 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 4/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
[🔗 Etkinlik Detayı](https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126){target="_blank"}
:::

:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

  document.querySelectorAll(".event-date").forEach(function (el) {
    const dateText = el.textContent.trim();
    const eventDate = new Date(dateText);
    eventDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

    if (eventDate < today) {
      el.classList.add("past-event-date");
    } else {
      el.classList.add("upcoming-event-date");
    }
  });
});
</script>
